todo.text: 📊 Analyze: 3 content ideas for social media; deliverable: content-plan markdown with hooks and posting slots | Why: Consistent content is required to grow Instagram audience to 10k | Proof: Content scheduled in planner with specific post times | Unlocks: Advances goal progress measurably

🔧 Fix: one repetitive workflow automation; deliverable: runnable script in scripts/ with usage header | Why: Improves OpenClaw reliability - essential for autonomous operations | Proof: Process runs successfully with measurable improvement | Unlocks: Progress toward: Write a simple script with input validation

📝 Draft: one company analysis using available metrics; deliverable: structured note in projects/company-research/ | Why: Understanding company financials is required for informed trading decisions | Proof: Analysis note has thesis, risks, and 3+ key metrics | Unlocks: Progress toward: Document 10 trade setups with outcomes

📚 Learn: one 15-second practice clip in Blender; deliverable: MP4 in projects/creative-practice/ with 3 bullet notes on what improved | Why: Directly builds 3D modeling/animation skills needed for Blender/Unreal goals | Proof: Export renders MP4/image and notes what was learned | Unlocks: Progress toward: Complete one procedural modeling tutorial

🎨 Creative MVP: Write a Python script that organizes files in one folder | Why: Creative MVPs build confidence and generate content for portfolio/social | Proof: Artifact created and demo note saved | Unlocks: Unlocks more ambitious creative projects
